offer: For construction contractors processing 5–10 projects/month, delayed reporting causes cash flow gaps. We automate progress reporting instead of manual reporting and spreadsheets.
problem: Inability to generate timely and accurate progress reports
channels_free: Post in Reddit communities for construction contractors
Engage in Indie Hackers discussions on similar workflows
DM outreach to contractors with demo video
Share insights in community forums for contractors
try_it: Let users try template-based report generation and progress tracking dashboard on 1-3 items
pay: unknown with a clear upgrade path
cheap_execution_checklist: 1-page landing page with the one-liner and CTA
Short demo video showing the manual-first workflow
Collect 10 short interviews from target users
Offer early-access onboarding for first 10 users
Post a weekly progress update in a relevant community
automation_simplification_ideas: One-click export of a simple report
